title: Role-Family Competency Pool
description: The per-family competency pool (applicability universe). Top-level keys are Role Family codes; each value is the array of competency codes that family may draw on — its family-specific competencies plus the shared canonical ones. A family without an entry has no defined pool.

^(SE|QE|BA|PM|XD|DA|IO|MC|PD)$.description: The complete competency-code pool for the family (family-specific + shared).
